Interactive TPN/IR Capstone Poster Analysis

Click directly on any poster section to open strategy notes over the poster. Use the guide toggle to make the clickable areas more or less visible.

Section Analysis

    Blue = background, methods, findings, next steps
    Green = future-state operating model recommendations
    Purple = expected impact / business case
    Click any numbered area or poster section for deeper analysis

    Tip: Press Escape or click outside the popup to close it.
